Taunt.name: Taunt
Taunt.desc_key: Enemies will attack you if possible
Taunt.description: Enemies will attack you if possible

Taunt2.desc_key: Enemies will attack you if possible (lower mana)
Taunt2.description: Enemies will attack you if possible (lower mana)

HeadButt.name: Headbutt
HeadButt.description: A melee attack that inflicts Stun.

HeadButt2.description:
A melee attack that inflicts Stun.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

ThrowShield.name: Throw Scrap
ThrowShield.description: Give +3 [img:shield] to a unit or spawn a scrap pickup on an empty tile.

ThrowShield2.description: Give +3 [img:shield] to units in an area and spawn scrap pickups on the empty tiles in that area.

AssBlast.name: Ass Blast
AssBlast.description: Knock back units in an area near you 2 tiles.

AssBlast2.description: Knock back units in a larger area near you 10 tiles.

Chew2.description: A melee attack with Lifesteal that inflicts Bleed 2 and ignores shield.

BatterUp2.description: Knock a unit back 10 tiles with Chain Knockback.

BackBreaker2.description: A melee attack that Immobilizes and gives -2 [img:spd].

Suplex.name: Suplex
Suplex.description: Grab a unit in front of you and slam it into the tile behind you.

Suplex2.description: Grab a unit in front of you and slam it into the tile behind you, inflicting Bruise 3 and Immobile.

Intimidate.name: Intimidate
Intimidate.description: Inflict Fear on an adjacent unit.

Intimidate2.description: Inflict Fear on a unit up to five tiles away.

Toss.name: Toss
Toss.description: Throw an adjacent unit to an open tile.

Toss2.description: Throw an adjacent unit to a tile, dealing bonus damage if it collides with something.

BonusToss.name: Toss
BonusToss.description:
Throw an adjacent unit to an open tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

BonusToss2.description:
Throw an adjacent unit to a tile, dealing bonus damage if it collides with something.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

NubbyToss.name: Toss
NubbyToss.description:
Throw your crippled friend to any tile.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

BellyFlop.name: Belly Flop
BellyFlop.description: Jump to a tile and Immobilize anything you land on.

BellyFlop2.description: Jump to a tile and Immobilize units in an area.

ToadJump_BasicMove.name: Jump
ToadJump_BasicMove.description: Jump to a tile and damage what you land on.

BellyFlop_BasicMove.name: Jump
BellyFlop_BasicMove.description: Jump to a tile and damage what you land on.

TankTrample.name: Trample Dash
TankTrample.description: Dash forward with Trample, then spawn a rock.

TankTrample2.description: Dash forward with Trample, then spawn a rock. Deals more damage and has a 20% chance to inflict Stun.

ToTheRescue.name: To the Rescue!
ToTheRescue.description: Jump to a tile adjacent to an ally. Damage and displace any units you land on.

ToTheRescue2.description: Jump to a tile adjacent to an ally. Damage and displace any units you land on, or are adjacent to.

TankTantrum.name: Tantrum
TankTantrum.description: Hit all adjacent units, then spawn a rock.

TankTantrum2.description: Hit all adjacent and diagonally adjacent units, then spawn a rock.

Earthquake.name: Earthquake
Earthquake.description:
Deal damage in a cone with a 10% chance to Petrify. Has a chance to spawn rocks.
[s:.7](This spell spawns rocks.)[/s]

Earthquake2.description:
Deal more damage in a cone with a 20% chance to Petrify. Has a chance to spawn rocks.
[s:.7](This spell spawns rocks.)[/s]

RockToss.name: Rock Toss
RockToss.description: Throw a rock with a 10% chance to Stun.

RockToss2.description: Throw a rock with a 33% chance to Stun.

BarbedWire.name: Barbed Wire
BarbedWire.description:
Give a unit +5 Thorns until your next turn.
[s:.7](You can target yourself.)[/s]

BarbedWire2.name: Barbed Wire
BarbedWire2.description:
Give a unit or object +5 Thorns until your next turn.
[s:.7](You can target yourself.)[/s]

DrawAttention.name: Goad
DrawAttention.description: Force an enemy to move towards you.

DrawAttention2.description:
Force an enemy anywhere to move towards you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

BowlOver2.description: Trample over two tiles diagonally with a 10% chance to inflict Stun.

Clap.name: Clap
Clap.description: Knock 2 enemies in front of you together.

Clap2.description: Knock 2 enemies in front of you together with +2 knockback damage.

TankRockSong.name: Rock Song
TankRockSong.description: Levitate all rocks. They will automatically fling towards enemies that end movement in line with them.

TankRockSong2.description:
Levitate all rocks. They will automatically fling towards enemies that end movement in line with them.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

RockCrusher.name: Rock Crusher
RockCrusher.description: Jump on top of a rock, exploding it. Deal damage and knock back all adjacent units.

RockCrusher2.description: Jump on top of a rock, exploding it. Deal high damage and knock back all adjacent units.

BodyGuard.name: Body Guard
BodyGuard.description: The next time an ally is targeted by an enemy, switch places with that ally.

BodyGuard2.description: The next time an ally is targeted by an enemy, switch places with that ally and gain +4 [img:shield].

Gore.name: Gore
Gore.description: Dash 3 tiles, damage, inflict Bruise and throw what you hit towards your original tile.

Gore2.description: Dash 10 tiles, damage, inflict Bruise and throw what you hit towards your original tile.

RockBlast2.description:
Shoot a rock forward with Chain Knockback.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

RockTomb.name: Rock Tomb
RockTomb.description: Damage and Petrify a unit within 3 tiles of you.

RockTomb2.description:
Damage and Petrify a unit within 5 tiles of you.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

BearHug.name: Grab
BearHug.description: Pull a unit within 2 tiles towards you, knocking it into you.

BearHug2.description: Pull a unit within 4 tiles towards you, knocking it into you and inflicting Grappled.

Fissure.name: Fissure
Fissure.description: Pull all units in a wide line towards the center of that line. This has a 10% chance to Petrify.

Fissure2.description: Pull all units in a wide line towards the center of that line. This has a 15% chance to Petrify and spawns rocks.

BigRock.name: Big Rock
BigRock.description: Drop a boulder on an adjacent tile, damaging and displacing units it lands on.

BigRock2.description: Drop a boulder on an adjacent tile, damaging, Stunning and displacing units it lands on.

FlipFlop.name: Flip Flop
FlipFlop.description:
Jump up to 3 tiles away, damage units you land on, then gain -1 [img:spd].
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost is equal to your [img:spd].
At 0 [img:spd], this spell is Castable once per turn.)[/s]

FlipFlop2.description:
Jump up to 4 tiles away, damage units you land on, then gain -1 [img:spd].
If your [img:spd] is 0, this has increased range and damage.
[s:.7](This spell's mana cost is equal to your [img:spd].
At 0 [img:spd], this spell is Castable once per turn.)[/s]

Lunge.name: Lunge
Lunge.description:
Dash forward one tile and attack with Knockback.
This spell uses up your movement action.

Lunge2.description:
Dash forward one tile, attack with Knockback and inflict Stun.
This spell uses up your movement action.

Nudge.name: Nudge
Nudge.description:
Push a unit back 1 tile.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana the first time it's used each turn.)[/s]

Nudge2.description:
Push a unit back 10 tiles.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana the first time it's used each turn.)[/s]

StoneGaze.name: Stone Breath
StoneGaze.description: Inflict Petrify on the first unit in a line.

StoneGaze2.description:
Inflict Petrify and Knockback on the first unit in a line.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Medusa.name: Gorgon Glare
Medusa.description: Inflict Petrify on all units in your line of sight.

Medusa2.description:
Inflict Petrify on all units in your line of sight.
[s:.7](This spell costs less.)[/s]

Anchor.name: Anchor
Anchor.description: Gain +4 Brace until the next time you move.

Anchor2.description:
Gain +4 Brace until the next time you move.
Bonus Passive: Knockback immunity.

EatRock.name: Eat Rock
EatRock.description: Eat a rock to gain +5 [img:shield] and +1 [img:str].

EatRock2.name: Eat Rock
EatRock2.description: Eat a rock to gain +5 [img:shield] and All Stats Up.

PlantFeet.name: Plant Your Feet
PlantFeet.description:
Gain +5 [img:shield] and -1 [img:spd]. 
If you are at 0 [img:spd], instead cleanse all of your debuffs.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

PlantFeet2.description:
Gain +6 [img:shield] and -1 [img:spd].
If you are at 0 [img:spd], instead cleanse all of your debuffs and gain All Stats Up.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]

IronHead.name: Iron Head
IronHead.description: Dash forward up to 3 tiles, gain +4 [img:shield] then damage and knock back adjacent units.

IronHead2.description: Dash forward up to 10 tiles, gain +4 [img:shield] then damage and knock back adjacent units with +5 knockback damage.

GangUp.name: Gang Up
GangUp.description: Toss a unit to an empty tile within 3 tiles of you, then your allies attack it if they can.

GangUp2.description: Toss a unit to an empty tile within 6 tiles of you and inflict Bruise, then your allies attack it if they can.

Aftershock.name: Aftershock
Aftershock.description: All units on dirt tiles get tossed to random nearby tiles and take damage when they land.

Aftershock2.description:
All units on dirt tiles get tossed to random tiles and take damage when they land.
Bonus Passive: All of your spells have Earth element.

SteelSkin.name: Steelskin
SteelSkin.description: Gain +99 Brace until your next turn, then disable this spell until you take a total of 25 damage.

SteelSkin2.description: Gain +99 Brace until your next turn, then disable this spell until you take a total of 15 damage.

FaultLine.name: Fault Line
FaultLine.description: Fling all units in a straight line onto nearby tiles.

FaultLine2.description: Fling all units in a straight line onto nearby tiles, dealing more damage.

Demolish.name: Demolish
Demolish.description: Turn a tile into a dirt tile, smashing any inanimate objects into rocks.

Demolish2.description: Turn 3 tiles into dirt tiles, smashing any inanimate objects into rocks.

CatapultJump.name: Cat-A-Pult!
CatapultJump.description:
Get flung to a tile and deal damage to anything you land on.
This doesn't use up your movement action.

CatapultJump2.description:
Get flung to a tile and deal damage to anything you land on.
This doesn't use up your movement action.

PushThrough.name: Push Through
PushThrough.description: Trample over 2 tiles in a straight line destroying any inanimate objects.

PushThrough2.description: Trample over 4 tiles in a straight line destroying any inanimate objects and inflicting Bruise 1 on units you trample.

Spur.name: Pincushion
Spur.description:
Gain +3 Thorns. 
This spell uses up your movement action.

Spur2.description:
Gain +3 Thorns and +1 Brace.
This spell uses up your movement action.

Supper.name: Supper
Supper.description:
Heal 15 HP and gain -2 [img:spd].
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

Supper2.description:
Heal 15 HP, gain -2 [img:spd] and +5 Health Regeneration.
[s:.7](Castable once per battle.)[/s]

FullForce.name: Full Force
FullForce.description: Deal damage equal to your [img:con] and inflict Stun. Also stuns yourself.

FullForce2.description: Deal damage equal to your [img:con] and inflict Stun and Bruise 4. Also stuns yourself.

Sandstorm.name: Sandstorm
Sandstorm.description:
Start a sandstorm.
(Sandstorm deals 1 damage to all units at the end of round.)
If a sandstorm was already active, increase its damage by 1.

Sandstorm2.description:
Start a sandstorm.
(Sandstorm deals 1 damage to all units at the end of round.)
If a sandstorm was already active, increase its damage by 1.
[s:.7](This spell costs 0 mana the first time you cast it each turn.)[/s]

Thicken.name: Thicken
Thicken.description: Gain +1 knockback damage and +1 knockback range until the end of the turn.

Thicken2.description:
Gain +1 [img:con].
Gain +1 knockback damage and +1 knockback range until the end of the turn.
